name: My site got no traffic because Google AI Overview ignored it - worth suing?
description: Low value; focus on SEO recovery over lawsuit.

mainEntity.name: My site got no traffic because Google AI Overview ignored it - worth suing?

acceptedAnswer.text: Low value; focus on SEO recovery over lawsuit.
acceptedAnswer.description: Probably not; no duty for Google to feature your site, and antitrust claims require market harm proof.[4] SEO losses aren't actionable. Key factors: Causation evidence; Section 230; class action viability low. Track analytics, optimize content, consider paid ads. Nationwide issue.
